name: Asparagus Won Tons
recipeInstructions:
1. In an uncovered electric skillet, heat 3/4 inch of oil to 360 degrees.
2. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine 1 envelope Instant Spring Vegetable Soup Mix, asparagus, and water chestnuts.
3. Place 2 teaspoons of the mixture on the center of each Won Ton wrapper.
4. Moisten the corners with water.
5. Fold the wrappers in half to form a triangle, and press the edges to seal.
6. Form the Won Ton by bringing together two opposite points and overlapping; moisten the overlapping points and press to seal well.
7. Fry in hot oil until golden brown; drain.
8. Serve, if desired, with soy sauce.
